summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Agents landing page. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI and integrations functional with excellent mobile responsiveness. Minor Claude API budget issue identified.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Budget exceeded error: 'Current cost: 0.006921, Max budget: 0.001'

integration_issues.issue: Chat returns error message due to API budget limit exceeded

Navigation Links Functionality (Agentes, Cómo funciona, Packs)
6 Agent Cards Display in Grid Layout
Agent Card Modal Opening and Closing
How It Works Section with 4 Steps
Packs Section with 4 Packs (Agencia, E-commerce, Profesionales, Full)
Pack Selection Opens Trial Form with Pre-selection
Trial Form Complete Integration (Fill, Submit, Success)
Chat Demo UI Functionality (Open, Close, Message Interface)
action_item_for_main_agent: Increase Claude API budget limit in emergentintegrations configuration. Current budget (0.001) is too low for testing/demo purposes. Suggested minimum: 0.05 or higher.
